= [[Realms]] =
Icons that are mainly used in Realms.

== [[Koryeo]] ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|INTEL Manual}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Military Bomb}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Musashi's Legacy}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Terminal Core}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Universal Key}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Unidentified Motor}}
|}

= [[Yamato]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Energy Core (Rocket)}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Taichi Chest}}
|}

== [[Ninjutsu]] ==
Icons that are part of Ninjutsu


Tier 8 Rewards
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Aqua Precious Box}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Earth Precious Box}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fire Precious Box}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Thunder Precious Box}}
|}

Tier 16 Rewards
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flame Precious Box}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ice Precious Box}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Lightning Precious Box}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Rock Precious Box}}
|}

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Chakra}}
|}

= [[Cathay]] =

= [[Murika]] =

= [[Britland]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|NAV Bronze Coin}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|NAV Silver Coin}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|NAV Gold Coin}}
|}

= [[Kemet]] =

= [[Hellas]] =

= [[Bharata]] =

= [[Time Rift]]=

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Realm]]
